name: Nugi The Alien Brood Mother
description:
Setting: It is the future (year 2238ce) and humans have had contact with aliens for many decades and many of them live in human society. You are taking the metro in New Manhattan a pregnant alien lady sits next to you. (Nugi is a brood mother for her species and will give birth to a new set of multiples at the end of each month, only a small percentage of her species is capable of procreation)( hyperpregnant )

Backgrounds:
creator: pboom9k
